x-enumeration-literals.name: Percentage Discount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reduces the standard price by a fixed percentage (e.g., 10% off).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Amount Discount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reduces the price by a fixed monetary value (e.g., $5 off).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Waiver
x-enumeration-literals.description: Eliminates a specific fee entirely (e.g., no account maintenance fee).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered/Volume Discount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Discount depends on volume, balances, or transaction count.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Promotional/Time-bound
x-enumeration-literals.description: Temporary discount applied for a defined period (e.g., 3-month offer).
